atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a static text disclaimer regarding the 'Intermountain Moms Page'.
The text states that patients should not seek diagnoses on the page.
A URL is displayed in yellow text: http://intermountainhealthcare.org/info/terms/Pages/social-media.aspx

ocr: The Intermountain Moms Page is built to connect mothers and families with information and a community of support. Here, participants will find an open forum to ask questions about their circumstances, find answers to common questions in both written and video format, and connect with healthcare providers.

Patients should not seek diagnoses for specific conditions on this page - diagnoses and treatment should be delivered only by qualified medical professionals in the appropriate venue. This page is for general information purposes. Our Facebook comment policy:

Contributors to the "Wall" and "Mother's Forum" may or may not be medical experts, and their posts should be considered opinion unless otherwise designated. General medical advice given in these forums should not be considered as official diagnoses. If you have questions, please verify information posted in these forums with a qualified medical professional.
spatial: The text is centered on the black background. The yellow URL is located in the middle section of the text block, below the second paragraph and above the third paragraph.
state_changes: transitioned to final black background text screen
